title: Paper Collection
description:
A unique paper associated with tracked conferences.

Each paper is stored once in the index; authors reference papers by ID.

Paper.description:
A unique paper associated with tracked conferences.

Each paper is stored once in the index; authors reference papers by ID.

id.description: Stable integer ID for this paper. Preserved across pipeline runs.
id.title: Id

title.description: Original paper title as found in DBLP.
title.title: Title

normalized_title.description: Lowercased title with punctuation removed, used for deduplication matching.
normalized_title.title: Normalized Title

badges.description: Artifact evaluation badges for this paper.
badges.title: Badges

artifact_citations.description: Number of citations to this paper's artifact.
artifact_citations.title: Artifact Citations

has_artifact.description: Whether this paper has an associated artifact (false for papers_without_artifacts).
has_artifact.title: Has Artifact
